arbitration_records.topic: Verification standard for Detailed Design Notes
arbitration_records.decision: Development may proceed only with requirement-linked tests and recorded evidence.
arbitration_records.rationale: The software lead prioritizes deterministic verification over implementation speed. Dev agents can propose implementation shortcuts, but test evidence remains the release gate.
required_follow_up: Each implementation task must reference at least one software requirement.
Each software requirement must have planned unit, system, and acceptance test evidence.
